app_intro.description_generic: Your access and responsibilities are based on the project team you're part of, not a fixed profile role.
app_intro.features_intro: Here are the top features you'll use every day:

generic_features.title: Project Context
generic_features.description: See the projects, tasks, and defects that matter for the work you're assigned.

generic_features.title: Team Collaboration
generic_features.description: Work with builders, contractors, and workers through project memberships and assignments.

generic_features.title: Field Updates
generic_features.description: Share progress, photos, and status changes without leaving the job flow.

builder_features.title: Project Control
builder_features.description: Set up projects and keep every detail in one place.

builder_features.title: Task Planning
builder_features.description: Create task dependencies, schedules, and clear ownership.

builder_features.title: Team Coordination
builder_features.description: Coordinate contractors and monitor live progress updates.

subcontractor_features.title: Task Visibility
subcontractor_features.description: See what is assigned, what is ready, and what comes next.

subcontractor_features.title: Availability
subcontractor_features.description: Share available days and keep scheduling accurate.

subcontractor_features.title: Field Updates
subcontractor_features.description: Upload photos and notes from site in a few taps.

worker_features.title: Assigned Work
worker_features.description: See only the tasks you are assigned, without project noise.

worker_features.title: Subtask Tracking
worker_features.description: Break work down into subtasks to keep execution organized.

worker_features.title: Progress Updates
worker_features.description: Post field updates so contractors and builders stay aligned.

phone_verification.title: Verify your phone
phone_verification.subtitle: We'll send a verification code to confirm your number.
phone_verification.phone_accessibility_hint: Enter a local or international phone number
phone_verification.code_helper: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your phone
phone_verification.edit_phone_accessibility_hint: Go back to edit your phone number
phone_verification.code_sent_announcement: Verification code sent to your phone
phone_verification.error_invalid_phone: Please enter a valid phone number
phone_verification.error_code_expired: Verification code expired. Please request a new code.
phone_verification.error_no_phone_found: No phone number found. Please start over.
phone_verification.error_wrong_code: Incorrect verification code. Please try again.
phone_verification.error_send_failed: Failed to send verification code. Check your network and SMS configuration.
phone_verification.error_verification_failed: Failed to verify your code. Please try again.
phone_verification.error_resend_failed: Failed to resend code. Please try again.
phone_verification.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
phone_verification.error_connection: Connection error. Please check your internet connection and try again.
phone_verification.phone_accessibility_hint_with_country: Enter a local phone number like {{localExample}}, or an international number like {{internationalExample}}.
phone_verification.no_attempts_remaining: No attempts remaining. Please request a new code.
phone_verification.send_code_accessibility_hint: Sends a verification code to your phone number
phone_verification.resend_accessibility_hint: Sends a new verification code to your phone
phone_verification.verify_accessibility_hint: Verifies the code and completes authentication

online_access.onboarding_message: Stay online to validate your details and finish onboarding.
online_access.report_message: You need an internet connection to submit a report.
online_access.translation_message: Realtime translation is paused while you're offline. Original text will remain visible until you reconnect.
online_access.connection_requests_message: You need an internet connection to manage connection requests.

bottom_sheet.label: Bottom sheet
bottom_sheet.drag_handle_hint_disabled: Swipe to dismiss is disabled while submitting
bottom_sheet.unsaved_message: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to close without saving?

e2e.title: Maestro test sign in
e2e.subtitle: Use these seeded users to start a deterministic mobile E2E session against the local API and PostgreSQL database.
e2e.sign_in_accessibility_hint: Creates a development test session and opens the app as the selected user.
e2e.session_error: Failed to create a test session. Make sure the local API is running.
